text:
To add the tracking pixel on your WordPress site, follow these steps:

1. **Go to your WordPress Admin Dashboard.**
2. **Navigate to Appearance → Theme Editor.**
3. **Select the header.php file** from the list on the right.
4. **Paste the tracking pixel code** just before the closing `</head>` tag.
5. **Click Update File** to save your changes.

Make sure to back up your site before making changes to the code. If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
